ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_classes" (
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test class */,
  "test_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test class the method belongs to */,
  "test_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_methods_test_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_class_id") REFERENCES test_classes ("test_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method the case belongs to */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  "test_case_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., functional, integration, unit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("test_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the result belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the test execution */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Execution time of the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was executed (e.g., dev, prod, staging) */,
  "test_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to execute the test */,
  "test_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the test was executed (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_descriptions" (
  "test_description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test description */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result the description belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test description was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_descriptions_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, tester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution_history" (
  "test_execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result the execution belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the test execution */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Execution time of the test */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_history_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_changes" (
  "test_result_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result change */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result the change belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "result" TEXT /* New result of the test */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_changes_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_test_method" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id", "test_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_method_test_class" (
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method */,
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_method_id", "test_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_test_case" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_test_result" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id", "test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_test_description" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "test_description_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id", "test_description_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_tags" (
  "test_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test tag */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_tags_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_attachments" (
  "test_attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test attachment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the attachment belongs to */,
  "attachment_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_attachments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_comments" (
  "test_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test comment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
